particulars.description: The leasehold property known as 72 mount pleasant road, tunbridge wells TN1 1RJ as the same is registered at hm land registry with title no TT166800 and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all buildings fixtures fittings plant and machinery from time to time situated on it and the leasehold property known as ground floor and basement 72 mount pleasant road tunbridge wells kent TN1 1RJ as more particularly described in a lease dated on or around the date of this deed and to be made between spurdown limited and A.E. hobbs, limited title number to be allocated on first registration and any part or parts of it and including all rights attached or appurtenant to it and all buildings fixtures fittings plant and machinery from time to time situated on it.
72 mount pleasant tunbridge wells kent together with the fixed and moveable plant, machinery and fixtures, fittings, implements and utensils.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever
